hero.intro: Machine maintenance, construction works and metalworking for businesses — plus handmade chairs, tables and frames from our workshop in Neede.
hero.trust1_tekst: Every piece from our workshop in Neede
hero.trust2_tekst: Size, wood type and design to your wishes
hero.trust3_tekst: You speak to the person who makes it

diensten.label: What we do
diensten.intro: One point of contact for maintenance, construction and processing. You call us — we solve it.
diensten.onderhoud_tekst: A stopped machine costs more than the repair. We maintain preventively and repair urgently — so your production keeps running.
diensten.constructie_tekst: Custom steel structures — from one-offs to small series, built to your drawing or developed together in the workshop.
diensten.bewerking_tekst: MIG, TIG, plasma and laser cutting, bending and finishing. If it's steel, we process it — in our own workshop, to order.

over_ons.label: About Ebbers Solutions
over_ons.intro: Based at the industrial estate in Neede, we work for companies that value quality and short lines.
over_ons.punt1: You speak to the person who makes your project
over_ons.punt2: Custom work without standard solutions that don't fit

collectie.label: Our work
collectie.intro: Handmade iron furniture — chairs, tables and frames from the Achterhoek.

cta.tekst: Tell us what you need. We respond quickly with a concrete proposal.

contact.intro: Call, email or fill in the form. We respond as quickly as possible.
